name: brandbook-directions
description: A Codex plugin for generating brandbooks that always start with three directions and then expand the selected route.

interface.shortDescription: Generate 3 routes, then a selected brandbook
interface.longDescription: A reusable brandbook workflow for turning a brief into three distinct visual directions, then translating the chosen route into a publish-ready brand system.
defaultPrompt: Turn this brief into 3 distinct brand directions.
Select the strongest route and expand the brandbook.
Build a publish-ready brand system from these references.
